response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:13: Identified performance of 'Seiza ni Naretara' by Kessoku Band. Searched for lyrics using Japanese title. 2. 03:14-03:49: Identified as an announcement/intro talk segment, no song. 3. 03:50-04:56: Identified performance of 'Agape' from 'UFO Princess Valkyrie'. Performed by AZKi and Robo-ko. Searched for lyrics using original composer Ritsuko Okazaki/Melody Note. Found correct lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two song performances by VTubers. First, AZKi and another performer sing 'Seiza ni Naretara' by Kessoku Band, followed by a brief announcement segment for a 'Crossover' live event featuring Robo-ko and Mizumiya Suu. Then, AZKi and Robo-ko perform 'Agape' by Melody Note.

scenes.description: AZKi and another performer sing 'Seiza ni Naretara' by Kessoku Band. The stage is brightly lit with a heart-shaped backdrop.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もうすぐ時計は6時
もうそこに一番星
影を踏んで 夜に紛れたくなる帰り道
どんなに探してみても
一つしかない星
何億光年 離れたところからあんなに輝く
いいな 君は みんなから愛されて
「いいや 僕は ずっと一人きりさ」
君と集まって星座になれたら
星降る夜 一瞬の願い事
きらめいて ゆらめいて 震えてるシグナル
空見上げて 指を差されるような
つないだ線 解かないで
僕がどんなに眩しくても
もうすぐ時計は8時
夜空に満天の星
何億光年 離れたところにはもうないかもしれない
月が綺麗で 泣きそうになるのは
いつの日にか 別れが来るから
彗星みたい 流れるひとりごと
消えていく残像は 真夜中のプリズム
君と集まって星座になれたら
切なる願い 誰かに届いたかな
変われるかな 夜の縁を
なぞるような こんな僕でも
遥か彼方 僕らは出会ってしまった
カルマだから 何度も出会ってしまうよ
雲の隙間で
君と集まって星座になれたら
君と集まって星座になれたら
夜広げて 描こう星座事
暗闇を 照らすような 満月じゃなくても
だから集まって星座になりたい
色とりどりの光 放つような
つないだ線 解かないよ
君がどんなに眩しくても
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Clock is soon to be 6 o'clock
The first star is already there
Treading on shadows, on the way home, I want to blend into the night
No matter how much I search
The only star that exists
Shining from billions of light-years away
That's nice, you're loved by everyone
'No, I'm always all alone'
If I could gather with you and become a constellation
On a night of falling stars, a momentary wish
Glittering, swaying, trembling signal
Looking up at the sky, as if pointing a finger
Don't untie the connected line
No matter how dazzling I am
Clock is soon to be 8 o'clock
Full sky of stars in the night sky
Billions of light-years away, there might not be any
Because the moon is beautiful, I feel like crying
Because one day, a parting will come
A monologue flowing like a comet
The disappearing afterimage is a prism in the middle of the night
If I could gather with you and become a constellation
A cutting wish, I wonder if it reached someone
I wonder if I can change it, tracing the edges of the night
Even a me like this
Far away, we happened to meet
Because it's karma, we'll meet again and again
Waiting in the gaps of the clouds
If I could gather with you and become a constellation
If I could gather with you and become a constellation
Opening the night, let's draw a constellation illustration
Even if it's not a full moon that illuminates the darkness
So I want to gather with you and become a constellation
Like the light of all sorts of colors, released
Don't untie the connected line
No matter how dazzling you are

scenes.description: Brief announcement segment for the 'Crossover' live event featuring Robo-ko and Mizumiya Suu.
AZKi and Robo-ko sing 'Agape' by Melody Note. The stage is dimly lit with heart shapes.
